changes.value:
## What

`kanban-app/ui/src/components/column-view.tsx` uses HTML `title=` on the add-task button:
- Line 478: `` title={`Add task to ${getStr(column, "name")}`} ``

Replace with `<Tooltip><TooltipTrigger asChild>...<TooltipContent>`.

**Files to modify:**
- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/column-view.tsx`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Add-task button shows styled Radix tooltip with column name
- [ ] No HTML `title=` attributes remain in column-view.tsx

## Tests
- [ ] Run `cd kanban-app && pnpm vitest run` — all tests pass
- [ ] Manual: hover over + button in column header
Replace title= with shadcn Tooltip in column-view.tsx

+## What

Replace HTML `title=` on add-task button with shadcn Tooltip.

**MANDATORY: TDD — write/update tests FIRST (RED), then implement (GREEN).**

**Files to modify:**
- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/column-view.test.tsx` — add test asserting aria-label and tooltip FIRST
- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/column-view.tsx` — replace `title=` with Tooltip + `aria-label`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests updated FIRST (RED), then code changed (GREEN)

- [ ] No HTML `title=` in column-view.tsx
